title: SDNM-024 Akita Komachi who is shy and tends to be passive but loves SEX Curious Yukari Saito 38 years old Debut Chapter 2 Libido open SEX seeking other people's cheeks while using a couple fight as an excuse
overview: Two months after the last shoot ... Mr. Saito, who had no communication, suddenly contacted me saying "I'm going to Tokyo now." It is said that the couple quarrels have run away from home, but the real reason is the uncontrollable divergence of libido. For a married woman who can't be honest, she leads her on a weekend-only trip to visit Ji-ko. Although he is confused, he gradually and aggressively confirms the joy of the woman who has forgotten many times and cums.
